summary: NumericArray fill/index/slice has exact rank and typed one-based axes; slices preserve owner and coordinates
requires: the operation kind is fill, scalar_index, or slice
the normalized receiver is NumericArray with exact rank, shape, orientation, and typed axis identities
readonly views retain owner provenance and cannot outlive or cross isolation
preconditions: the descriptor selects one closed NumericArray operation kind
rank, shape, selected axes, and owner provenance are explicit
default source-visible axis coordinates are typed Int domains 1..dimension
normalization: normalize the NumericArray identity, rank, shape, orientation, ordered typed axes and owner provenance; never import an ordinary Sequence index witness
decision_procedure: reject a non-NumericArray receiver with SLICE_SOURCE_REQUIRES_NUMERIC_ARRAY
for scalar_index require exactly rank ordered scalar axes and evaluate each against its typed 1..dimension domain
for slice require exactly rank ordered scalar, range, or * axes; reject a mismatch with SLICE_AXIS_COUNT_MISMATCH
evaluate every scalar with LogicalIndexDomainAdmitted and every range with SliceRangeAdmitted left-to-right
evaluate SliceViewLifetimeAdmitted for the readonly result and admit only when owner provenance and all axes admit
for fill require exact shape cardinality and element-domain agreement under its existing fill laws; create no product receipt
termination_metric: finite descriptor size plus strictly decreasing dependency DAG rank
evaluation_order: preconditions -> normalization -> dependencies -> local rule -> diagnostic

summary: R51a1 design predicate; product checker NOT_RUN.
requires: RCTSDescriptorV5 fields required by the referenced feature laws
preconditions: RCTSDescriptorV5 fields required by the referenced feature laws
normalization: normalize aliases, ownership regions, rows, labels, and witness identities before decision
decision_procedure: validate the declared descriptor shape as design documentation only
record PrimaryCtorPromotedFieldVisibilityMemberOnly requires and candidate diagnostic vocabulary without executing a checker decision
emit no diagnostic and create no product execution receipt while predicate_maturity is design_seed
promote only after a closed terminating algorithm plus discriminating positive/negative fixtures is independently reviewed
termination_metric: finite descriptor size plus strictly decreasing dependency DAG rank
evaluation_order: preconditions -> normalization -> dependencies -> local rule -> diagnostic

summary: Classify `$`/`$$`, preserve CST, and normalize to ordinary immutable/mutable local binding before semantic checking.
normalization: normalize aliases, ownership regions, rows, labels, and witness identities before decision
decision_procedure: evaluate and retain the initializer source expression once
map $ to let and $$ to var while preserving the optional type annotation
construct an ordinary local-binding semantic node after successful normalization
assert no FlowBinding AST/HIR/MIR node survives
termination_metric: finite descriptor size plus strictly decreasing dependency DAG rank
evaluation_order: preconditions -> normalization -> dependencies -> local rule -> diagnostic
